prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学医学部在陕西省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约182名、622名、312名、229名、360名，整体呈波动走势。2022年因扩招及试卷难度等因素位次大幅后移至622名，2023–2024年回升至300名以内，2025年再次后移至360名。近3年位次中枢约300名，2025年基准位次约360名；该校在陕西省招生计划持续增长：2021年18人，2022–2024年均为23人，2025年增至24人，2026年（招生计划文件）进一步扩招至29人，较2025年增加约20.8%。扩招意味着更多考生有机会被录取，但同时也使竞争面扩大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学（985、211、双一流），软科主榜北京大学稳居全国第2名。医学部作为国内顶尖医学院校，在临床医学、口腔医学、基础医学、药学等领域具有极高的学术声誉和行业地位，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉监测中北京大学整体评价偏负面，但主要涉及校本部管理类事件，医学部作为独立招生代码未受直接冲击。抖音热度方面北京大学位列全国第3（高热），品牌曝光度持续高位。未见医学部投档异常或断档记录，报考心理整体稳定；依托北京大学学科评估：临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+、公共卫生与预防医学A。这些学科直接对应医学部招生专业，学科实力全国顶尖，对考生有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学连续多年为高热推荐专业，社会认可度高；药学、预防医学等专业热度平稳。陕西省2026年物理类考生约20.65万人，较2025年17.25万人增加约3.4万人（增幅约19.7%），考生规模大幅增长加剧了全省高分段竞争。；北京大学医学部位于北京，属跨省报考。该校在陕西招生占比从2021年的约0.5%逐步提升至2025年的约0.9%，2026年计划29人进一步扩大在陕招生规模，体现了对陕西生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次360名、2026年扩招约20.8%（供需弹性主值405名）、陕西省物理类考生大幅增加约19.7%加剧竞争、临床口腔等专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在405名基础上进一步后移至约420名。波动区间考虑历史波动幅度及学校顶尖层次（区间比例上限12%），给出370–470名的合理范围。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 基础医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（五年制）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 药学（六年制本硕连读）
- 预防医学（七年制本硕连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学技术类（医学检验技术、医学影像技术）
- 英语（医学英语）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在370–470名区间内，建议以二档专业（五年制临床/口腔、药学本硕）为主攻方向，一档八年制专业（口腔/临床本博连读）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（医学技术类、医学英语）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<370名）可重点冲击一档王牌八年制专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University Health Science Center in Shaanxi Province's science/physics category were approximately 182, 622, 312, 229, and 360 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2022, due to factors such as enrollment expansion and exam difficulty, the ranking significantly dropped to 622. From 2023 to 2024, it recovered to within 300, and in 2025, it dropped again to 360. The median ranking over the past three years is about 300, with a baseline ranking of approximately 360 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi Province has been continuously increasing: 18 students in 2021, 23 students each year from 2022 to 2024, 24 students in 2025, and further expansion to 29 students in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an increase of about 20.8% compared to 2025. Enrollment expansion means more candidates have the opportunity to be admitted, but it also broadens the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University (985, 211, Double First-Class). On the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University firmly holds the 2nd place nationally. As a top medical school in China, the Health Science Center has extremely high academic reputation and industry status in fields such as clinical medicine, stomatology, basic medicine, and pharmacy, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In the 2026 reputation monitoring, Peking University's overall evaluation was somewhat negative, but mainly related to management incidents at the main campus; the Health Science Center, as an independent admission code, was not directly affected. On Douyin, Peking University ranks 3rd nationally (high heat), with sustained high brand exposure. No abnormal admissions or gaps have been recorded for the Health Science Center, and the application psychology remains stable. Relying on Peking University's discipline evaluations: clinical medicine A, stomatology A, basic medicine A, pharmacy A+, nursing A+, public health and preventive medicine A. These disciplines directly correspond to the Health Science Center's admission majors, with national top-tier academic strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine and stomatology have been highly recommended majors for many years, with high social recognition. Pharmacy, preventive medicine, and other majors have stable popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,000 (approximately 19.7%) compared to 172,500 in 2025. The significant growth in candidate numbers intensifies competition in the high-score segment across the province. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, making it a cross-province application. The proportion of its enrollment in Shaanxi has gradually increased from about 0.5% in 2021 to about 0.9% in 2025. The 2026 plan of 29 students further expands the enrollment scale in Shaanxi, reflecting the emphasis on Shaanxi student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 360, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 20.8% (supply-demand elasticity main value 405), the significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi physics category candidates intensifying competition, and the sustained high popularity of majors like clinical medicine and stomatology, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will further drop to about 420 based on 405. Considering historical fluctuation range and the top-tier level of the school (upper limit of range ratio 12%), a reasonable range of 370–470 is given.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Stomatology (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Basic Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Pharmacy (Six-Year Bachelor-Master Continuous Program)
- Preventive Medicine (Seven-Year Bachelor-Master Continuous Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Technology (Medical Laboratory Technology, Medical Imaging Technology)
- English (Medical English).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With a predicted ranking in the 370–470 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (five-year clinical/stomatology, pharmacy bachelor-master) as the main direction, Tier 1 eight-year majors (stomatology/clinical bachelor-doctor continuous programs) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (medical technology, medical English) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<370), it is advisable to focus on sprinting for the top-tier Tier 1 eight-year majors.
